resources.string: Call our project assistance line at 1-800-957-6457 between 9 am and 5 pm, Eastern Time, Monday through Friday or email us at fdastudy@rti.org

string-array.name: ms_texts
string-array.item: Welcome to the Point of Sale Intervention\n for Tobacco Evaluation Study!

Thank you for agreeing to participate in the smartphone app portion of the study.

 This new approach to research uses your phone's technology to determine how often you go to stores that sell tobacco products.

The app will also ask you to complete a short questionnaire (5 minutes or less) three times between 2018 and 2020.
